description: Rig the sunglasses prop (/home/ga/OpenToonz/assets/sunglasses.png) to the character in the scene /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Use the Hook Tool to create a tracking hook on the character's face that follows the head motion. Parent the sunglasses to the character using the hook as the handle so the prop moves automatically without manual keyframing. Save the scene to /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/spy_run/spy_run.tnz and render the animation to /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/spy_run/spy_run.mp4.
